unit.name: WP_Http request preemptive response decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that a pre_http_request value other than boolean false short-circuits and returns that value. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, pre_http_request filter timing/payload, native returned array/WP_Error value, URL filtering/parsing, invalid/blocked request branches, Requests dispatch avoidance, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Temporary copied public PHP shell retired for this bounded branch; full WP_Http::request ownership still requires request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates.
